hook: Your gum health might impact your heart and brain more than you think.

script.hook: Your gum health might impact your heart and brain more than you think.
beats: Periodontal disease can increase cardiovascular event risk by 20-50%.
Bacteria from gum disease can enter the bloodstream and contribute to heart issues.
Research suggests a link between gum disease and Alzheimer's, but more studies are needed.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Show an animated heart and brain with gum disease imagery.
Display statistics on cardiovascular risk associated with gum disease.
End with a call to action for dental health check-ups.

captions.instagram: Your gum health might be more important than you think! 🦷❤️ #DentalHealth #HeartHealth
captions.facebook: Did you know your gums can affect your heart and brain? Learn more about the dental-systemic connection! #HealthFacts
captions.tiktok: Gum disease isn't just about your mouth. It can impact your heart and brain health! 🦷💔 #HealthMyths
captions.youtube: Exploring the surprising connection between gum health and systemic diseases like heart issues and Alzheimer's. #DentalHealth

titles.instagram: The Surprising Truth About Gum Health
titles.facebook: Gum Health: More Important Than You Think
titles.tiktok: Gum Disease Affects Your Heart & Brain?
titles.youtube: How Your Gums Impact Your Overall Health

complianceNotes: Do not imply diagnosis or treatment.
Retain at least one meaningful caveat from the article.
